entries.source: We may amend Terms at any time by posting the amended terms on this site. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of the Platform following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you. By continuing to access or use our Service after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use Service.
entries.value: Tunaweza kurekebisha Terms wakati wowote kwa kuchapisha masharti yaliyorekebishwa kwenye tovuti hii. Ni wajibu wako kupitia Terms hizi mara kwa mara. Kuendelea kwako kutumia Platform baada ya kuchapishwa kwa Terms zilizorekebishwa kunamaanisha kwamba unakubali na kuridhia mabadiliko hayo. Unatarajiwa kukagua ukurasa huu mara kwa mara ili ujue mabadiliko yoyote, kwa kuwa yanakufunga. Kwa kuendelea kufikia au kutumia Service yetu baada ya marekebisho yoyote kuanza kutumika, unakubali kufungwa na masharti yaliyorekebishwa. Ikiwa hukubaliani na masharti mapya, huna tena idhini ya kutumia Service.

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. Business Transaction: If our subsidiaries or we are involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, your Personal Data may be transferred. Other cases. We may disclose your information also: to our subsidiaries and affiliates; to contractors, service providers, and other third parties we use to support our business; to fulfil the purpose for which you provide it; to include your company’s logo on our website; for any other purpose disclosed by us when you provide the information; with your consent in any other cases; if we believe disclosure is necessary or appropriate to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Company, our customers, or others.
entries.value: Tunaweza kufichua taarifa binafsi tunazokusanya, au unazotupatia: Ufichuzi kwa Utekelezaji wa Sheria: Chini ya hali fulani, tunaweza kuhitajika kufichua Data yako ikiwa sheria inatutaka kufanya hivyo au kwa kujibu maombi halali ya mamlaka za umma. Muamala wa Biashara: Ikiwa kampuni zetu tanzu au sisi tutahusika katika muungano, ununuzi, au uuzaji wa mali, Personal Data yako inaweza kuhamishwa. Hali nyingine. Tunaweza pia kufichua taarifa zako: kwa kampuni zetu tanzu na washirika; kwa wakandarasi, watoa huduma, na wahusika wengine wa tatu tunaowatumia kusaidia biashara yetu; kutimiza madhumuni ambayo uliitoa; kujumuisha nembo ya kampuni yako kwenye tovuti yetu; kwa madhumuni mengine yoyote tunayofichua unapotoa taarifa; kwa idhini yako katika hali nyingine zozote; ikiwa tunaamini ufichuzi ni muhimu au unaofaa kulinda haki, mali, au usalama wa Company, wateja wetu, au wengine.

entries.source: We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service on our behalf, perform Service-related services or assist us in analysing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.
entries.value: Tunaweza kutumia kampuni na watu wa tatu kusaidia Service yetu (“Service Providers”), kutoa Service kwa niaba yetu, kufanya huduma zinazohusiana na Service, au kutusaidia kuchambua jinsi Service yetu inavyotumiwa. Wahusika hawa wa tatu wana ufikiaji wa Personal Data yako tu ili kufanya kazi hizi kwa niaba yetu na wanawajibika kutofichua au kuitumia kwa madhumuni mengine yoyote.

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.
entries.value: Tunaweza kutoa bidhaa na/au huduma za kulipia ndani ya Service. Katika hali hiyo, tunatumia huduma za wahusika wa tatu kuchakata malipo (kwa mfano wachakataji malipo). Hatutahifadhi wala kukusanya maelezo ya kadi yako ya malipo. Taarifa hizo hutolewa moja kwa moja kwa wachakataji wetu wa malipo wa wahusika wa tatu ambao matumizi yao ya taarifa zako binafsi yanasimamiwa na Privacy Policy yao. Wachakataji hawa wa malipo hufuata viwango vilivyowekwa na PCI-DSS kama vinavyosimamiwa na PCI Security Standards Council, juhudi ya pamoja ya chapa kama Visa, Mastercard, American Express na Discover. Mahitaji ya PCI-DSS husaidia kuhakikisha taarifa za malipo zinashughulikiwa kwa usalama.

entries.source: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using Service. All provisions of Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.
entries.value: Tunaweza kusitisha au kusimamisha akaunti yako na kuzuia ufikiaji wa Service mara moja, bila taarifa ya awali au dhima, kwa hiari yetu pekee, kwa sababu yoyote ile na bila kikomo, ikiwemo bila kikomo ukiukaji wa Terms. Ikiwa unataka kusitisha akaunti yako, unaweza kuacha tu kutumia Service. Vifungu vyote vya Terms ambavyo kwa asili yake vinapaswa kuendelea baada ya kusitishwa vitaendelea, ikiwemo bila kikomo vifungu vya umiliki, kukanusha dhamana, fidia, na mipaka ya dhima.

entries.source: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We will let you know via email and/or a prominent notice on our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update “effective date” at the top of this Privacy Policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
entries.value: Tunaweza kusasisha Privacy Policy yetu mara kwa mara. Tutakujulisha kuhusu mabadiliko yoyote kwa kuchapisha Privacy Policy mpya kwenye ukurasa huu. Tutakujulisha kupitia barua pepe na/au notisi inayoonekana wazi kwenye Service yetu kabla ya mabadiliko kuanza kutumika na tutasasisha “effective date” juu ya Privacy Policy hii. Unashauriwa kupitia Privacy Policy hii mara kwa mara kwa mabadiliko yoyote. Mabadiliko ya Privacy Policy hii huanza kutumika yanapochapishwa kwenye ukurasa huu.

entries.source: We may use remarketing services to advertise on third party websites to you after you visited our Service. We and our third-party vendors use cookies to inform, optimise and serve ads based on your past visits to our Service.
entries.value: Tunaweza kutumia huduma za remarketing kukutangazia kwenye tovuti za wahusika wa tatu baada ya kutembelea Service yetu. Sisi na wauzaji wetu wa wahusika wa tatu hutumia cookies kuarifu, kuboresha, na kutoa matangazo kulingana na ziara zako za awali kwenye Service yetu.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to automate the development process of our Service.
entries.value: Tunaweza kutumia Service Providers wa wahusika wa tatu kuendesha kiotomatiki mchakato wa maendeleo wa Service yetu.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to monitor and analyze the use of our Service.
entries.value: Tunaweza kutumia Service Providers wa wahusika wa tatu kufuatilia na kuchambua matumizi ya Service yetu.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to show advertisements to you to help support and maintain our Service.
entries.value: Tunaweza kutumia Service Providers wa wahusika wa tatu kukuonyesha matangazo ili kusaidia na kudumisha Service yetu.

entries.source: We reserve the right to withdraw or amend our Service, and any service or material we provide via Service, in our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason all or any part of Service is unavailable at any time or for any period. From time to time, we may restrict access to some parts of Service, or the entire Service, to users, including registered users.
entries.value: Tunahifadhi haki ya kuondoa au kurekebisha Service yetu, na huduma au nyenzo yoyote tunayotoa kupitia Service, kwa hiari yetu pekee bila taarifa. Hatutawajibika ikiwa kwa sababu yoyote Service yote au sehemu yoyote haitapatikana wakati wowote au kwa kipindi chochote. Mara kwa mara, tunaweza kuzuia ufikiaji wa baadhi ya sehemu za Service, au Service yote, kwa watumiaji, wakiwemo watumiaji waliosajiliwa.

entries.source: We respect the intellectual property rights of others. It is our policy to respond to any claim that Content posted on Service infringes on the copyright or other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) of any person or entity. If you are a copyright owner, or authorized on behalf of one, and you believe that the copyrighted work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please submit your claim via email to support@inspir.app, with the subject line: “Copyright Infringement” and include in your claim a detailed description of the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” You may be held accountable for damages (including costs and attorneys’ fees) for misrepresentation or bad-faith claims on the infringement of any Content found on and/or through Service on your copyright.
entries.value: Tunaheshimu haki za miliki za wengine. Ni sera yetu kujibu dai lolote kwamba Content iliyochapishwa kwenye Service inakiuka hakimiliki au haki nyingine za miliki (“Infringement”) za mtu au shirika lolote. Ikiwa wewe ni mmiliki wa hakimiliki, au umeidhinishwa kwa niaba ya mmoja, na unaamini kwamba kazi yenye hakimiliki imenakiliwa kwa namna inayounda ukiukaji wa hakimiliki, tafadhali wasilisha dai lako kwa barua pepe kwa support@inspir.app, ukiwa na mada: “Copyright Infringement” na ujumuishe katika dai lako maelezo ya kina ya Infringement inayodaiwa kama ilivyoelezwa hapa chini, chini ya “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims”. Unaweza kuwajibishwa kwa hasara (ikiwemo gharama na ada za mawakili) kwa kutoa taarifa ya uongo au madai ya nia mbaya kuhusu ukiukaji wa Content yoyote inayopatikana kwenye na/au kupitia Service kwa hakimiliki yako.

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: Tunatumia cookies na teknolojia zinazofanana za ufuatiliaji kufuatilia shughuli kwenye Service yetu na tunashikilia taarifa fulani. Cookies ni faili zenye kiasi kidogo cha data ambacho kinaweza kujumuisha kitambulisho cha kipekee kisichojulikana. Cookies hutumwa kwa kivinjari chako kutoka tovuti na kuhifadhiwa kwenye kifaa chako. Teknolojia nyingine za ufuatiliaji pia hutumiwa kama beacons, tags na scripts kukusanya na kufuatilia taarifa na kuboresha na kuchambua Service yetu. Unaweza kuelekeza kivinjari chako kukataa cookies zote au kuonyesha wakati cookie inapotumwa. Hata hivyo, usipokubali cookies, huenda usiweze kutumia baadhi ya sehemu za Service yetu. Mifano ya Cookies tunazotumia: Session Cookies: Tunatumia Session Cookies kuendesha Service yetu. Preference Cookies: Tunatumia Preference Cookies kukumbuka mapendeleo yako na mipangilio mbalimbali. Security Cookies: Tunatumia Security Cookies kwa madhumuni ya usalama. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies hutumiwa kukuletea matangazo yanayoweza kuwa muhimu kwako na maslahi yako.

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.
entries.value: Tulitoka nje ya sayari yetu. Hata hivyo, maendeleo ya haraka na muhimu zaidi yalikuwa katika mawasiliano na teknolojia, ambayo yameunganisha idadi ya watu duniani ya zaidi ya bilioni 3.

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.
entries.value: Tutahifadhi Personal Data yako kwa muda unaohitajika tu kwa madhumuni yaliyowekwa katika Privacy Policy hii. Tutahifadhi na kutumia Personal Data yako kwa kiwango kinachohitajika kutimiza wajibu wetu wa kisheria (kwa mfano, ikiwa tunatakiwa kuhifadhi data yako ili kutii sheria zinazotumika), kutatua migogoro, na kutekeleza makubaliano na sera zetu za kisheria. Pia tutahifadhi Usage Data kwa madhumuni ya uchambuzi wa ndani. Usage Data kwa kawaida huhifadhiwa kwa muda mfupi zaidi, isipokuwa wakati data hii inapotumiwa kuimarisha usalama au kuboresha utendaji wa Service yetu, au tunapolazimika kisheria kuhifadhi data hii kwa muda mrefu zaidi.

entries.source: Welcome to Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) (“Company”, “we”, “our”, “us”)! These Terms of Service (“Terms”, “Terms of Service”) govern your use of our website located atwww.inspir.appand applications available on app stores (together or individually “Service”) operated by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). Our Privacy Policy also governs your use of our Service and explains how we collect, safeguard and disclose information that results from your use of our web pages. The privacy policy is available at inspir.app/privacy Your agreement with us includes these Terms and our Privacy Policy (“Agreements”). You acknowledge that you have read and understood the Agreements, and agree to be bound of them. If you do not agree with (or cannot comply with) Agreements, then you may not use the Service, but please let us know by emailing support@inspir.appso we can try to find a solution. These Terms apply to all visitors, users and others who wish to access or use the Service.
entries.value: Karibu Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) (“Company”, “we”, “our”, “us”)! Terms of Service hizi (“Terms”, “Terms of Service”) zinasimamia matumizi yako ya tovuti yetu iliyo katika www.inspir.app na programu zinazopatikana kwenye app stores (kwa pamoja au kila moja “Service”) zinazoendeshwa na Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). Privacy Policy yetu pia inasimamia matumizi yako ya Service yetu na inaeleza jinsi tunavyokusanya, kulinda na kufichua taarifa zinazotokana na matumizi yako ya kurasa zetu za wavuti. Sera ya faragha inapatikana katika inspir.app/privacy Makubaliano yako nasi yanajumuisha Terms hizi na Privacy Policy yetu (“Agreements”). Unakiri kwamba umesoma na kuelewa Agreements, na unakubali kufungwa nazo. Ikiwa hukubaliani na (au huwezi kutii) Agreements, basi huwezi kutumia Service, lakini tafadhali tujulishe kwa kutuma barua pepe support@inspir.app ili tujaribu kupata suluhisho. Terms hizi zinatumika kwa wageni wote, watumiaji, na wengine wanaotaka kufikia au kutumia Service.

entries.source: When you create an account with us, you guarantee that the information you provide us is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Inaccurate, incomplete, or obsolete information may result in the immediate termination of your account on Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, including but not limited to the restriction of access to your computer and/or account. You agree to accept responsibility for any and all activities or actions that occur under your account and/or password, whether your password is with our Service or a third-party service. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account. You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity or that is not lawfully available for use, a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity other than you, without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar or obscene. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders in our sole discretion.
entries.value: Unapofungua akaunti nasi, unahakikisha kwamba taarifa unazotupatia ni sahihi, kamili, na za sasa wakati wote. Taarifa zisizo sahihi, zisizokamilika, au zilizopitwa na wakati zinaweza kusababisha kusitishwa mara moja kwa akaunti yako kwenye Service. Unawajibika kudumisha usiri wa akaunti na nenosiri lako, ikiwemo bila kikomo kuzuia ufikiaji wa kompyuta yako na/au akaunti yako. Unakubali kuwajibika kwa shughuli au vitendo vyote vinavyotokea chini ya akaunti na/au nenosiri lako, iwe nenosiri lako liko kwenye Service yetu au huduma ya mhusika wa tatu. Lazima utuarifu mara moja unapogundua uvunjaji wowote wa usalama au matumizi yasiyoidhinishwa ya akaunti yako. Huwezi kutumia kama jina la mtumiaji jina la mtu au shirika jingine au jina ambalo halipatikani kisheria kwa matumizi, jina au alama ya biashara iliyo chini ya haki za mtu au shirika jingine isipokuwa wewe, bila idhini inayofaa. Huwezi kutumia kama jina la mtumiaji jina lolote lenye kuudhi, uchafu, au aibu. Tunahifadhi haki ya kukataa huduma, kusitisha akaunti, kuondoa au kuhariri maudhui, au kughairi maagizo kwa hiari yetu pekee.

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: Unapobandika noti kwenye AI, iombe igawanye mawazo mapana katika kazi hizo. Seti yenye kadi 18 mahususi kwa kawaida ni bora kuliko seti yenye kadi 5 kubwa ambazo kila moja ina aya nzima.

entries.source: While using our Service, we may also collect the following information: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence and actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details of documents on education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, information on bonuses and compensation, information on marital status, family members, social security (or other taxpayer identification) number, office location and other data. Payment Data. We may collect data necessary to process your payment if you make purchases, such as your payment instrument number (such as a credit card number), and the security code associated with your payment instrument. All payment data is stored by Razorpay. You may find their privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy
entries.value: Unapotumia Service yetu, tunaweza pia kukusanya taarifa zifuatazo: jinsia, umri, tarehe ya kuzaliwa, mahali pa kuzaliwa, maelezo ya pasipoti, uraia, usajili wa mahali pa makazi na anwani halisi, nambari ya simu (kazini, mkononi), maelezo ya hati za elimu, sifa, mafunzo ya kitaaluma, mikataba ya ajira, taarifa kuhusu bonasi na fidia, taarifa kuhusu hali ya ndoa, wanafamilia, nambari ya hifadhi ya jamii (au kitambulisho kingine cha mlipakodi), eneo la ofisi na data nyingine. Payment Data. Tunaweza kukusanya data inayohitajika kuchakata malipo yako ikiwa unanunua, kama nambari ya kifaa chako cha malipo (kama nambari ya kadi ya mkopo), na msimbo wa usalama unaohusiana na kifaa chako cha malipo. Data yote ya malipo huhifadhiwa na Razorpay. Unaweza kupata kiungo/viungo vya notisi yao ya faragha hapa: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy

entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address of Student and Parent First name and last name of Student and Parent Phone number of Student and Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies and Usage Data We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information that may interest you. You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.
entries.value: Unapotumia Service yetu, tunaweza kukuomba utupatie taarifa fulani zinazoweza kukutambulisha binafsi ambazo zinaweza kutumiwa kuwasiliana nawe au kukutambua (“Personal Data”). Taarifa zinazoweza kukutambulisha binafsi zinaweza kujumuisha, lakini si kwa kikomo: Anwani ya barua pepe ya Mwanafunzi na Mzazi Jina la kwanza na la mwisho la Mwanafunzi na Mzazi Nambari ya simu ya Mwanafunzi na Mzazi Anwani, Nchi, Jimbo, Mkoa, ZIP/Postal code, Jiji Jina la shule Darasa Cookies na Usage Data Tunaweza kutumia Data yako kuwasiliana nawe kwa majarida, nyenzo za masoko au matangazo na taarifa nyingine ambazo zinaweza kukuvutia. Unaweza kujiondoa kupokea yoyote, au yote, ya mawasiliano haya kutoka kwetu kwa kufuata kiungo cha kujiondoa. Usage Data, Tunaweza pia kukusanya taarifa ambazo kivinjari chako hutuma kila unapotembelea Service yetu au unapofikia Service kupitia kifaa chochote (“Usage Data”). Usage Data hii inaweza kujumuisha taarifa kama anwani ya Internet Protocol ya kompyuta yako (kwa mfano IP address), aina ya kivinjari, toleo la kivinjari, kurasa za Service yetu unazotembelea, muda na tarehe ya ziara yako, muda uliotumia kwenye kurasa hizo, vitambulisho vya kipekee vya kifaa na data nyingine ya uchunguzi. Unapofikia Service kwa kifaa, Usage Data hii inaweza kujumuisha taarifa kama aina ya kifaa unachotumia, ID ya kipekee ya kifaa chako, IP address ya kifaa chako, mfumo endeshi wa kifaa chako, aina ya kivinjari cha Intaneti unachotumia, vitambulisho vya kipekee vya kifaa na data nyingine ya uchunguzi.

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: Historia ya dunia wakati wote imekuwa kama kukuza picha kutoka mbali, picha iliyokuwa ikibadilika. Karne zilizoelekea karne ya 19 ziliashiria hatua ya mabadiliko katika historia ya binadamu, dunia ilipohama kutoka mtazamo bapa na uliodhibitiwa wa ulimwengu kwenda uelewa unaokua wa maeneo na makoloni mapya. Mapinduzi ya Ufaransa yaliashiria mara ya kwanza ambapo idadi kubwa ya watu ilikusanyika kupinga na kuanzisha maadili ya uhuru, usawa, na udugu. Matukio ya Vita vya Pili vya Dunia pia yaliunda dunia kwa karne iliyofuata na kuweka msingi wa karne ya 21.

entries.source: Yes, but the recommended workflow is hint-first. Use it to understand the method, check your work, and review errors instead of copying a final answer.
entries.value: Ndiyo, lakini mtiririko unaopendekezwa ni kidokezo-kwanza. Itumie kuelewa mbinu, kukagua kazi yako, na kurudia makosa badala ya kunakili jibu la mwisho.

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: Ndiyo, inapotoa vidokezo, hukagua mantiki, hueleza makosa, na kukuomba utoe jibu la mwisho badala ya kukuandikia.

entries.source: Yes. {value1} opens as a public guest learning mode at {value2}, so you can start with a few free guest messages before creating an account.
entries.value: Ndiyo. {value1} hufunguka kama hali ya umma ya kujifunza kama mgeni katika {value2}, kwa hiyo unaweza kuanza kwa ujumbe michache ya bure kama mgeni kabla ya kufungua akaunti.

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Mtiririko mzuri ni kujifunza msingi kutoka chanzo cha masomo kinachoaminika, kisha kutumia inspir kuuliza maswali ya kufuatilia, kufanya mazoezi ya kukumbuka, kurekebisha dhana potofu, na kupanga cha kurudia baadaye.

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Shule inaweza kuanza kwa kujaribu hali za umma, kisha kwenda kwenye majaribio au usambazaji maalum wakati matumizi, mahitaji ya maudhui, na njia ya ufadhili viko wazi.

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Kurasa za hadhira huunganisha tu na hali za umma za wageni, miongozo, vidokezo vya kuanzia, njia za kujifunza, na faili za ugunduzi zinazosomeka na AI. Gumzo binafsi zilizohifadhiwa hubaki zimeondolewa.

entries.source: Yes. Category pages link into public guest modes, learning paths, and article clusters so learners can move from reading into tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, or feedback.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Kurasa za kategoria huunganisha na hali za umma za wageni, njia za kujifunza, na makundi ya makala ili wanafunzi waweze kuhama kutoka kusoma kwenda ufundishaji, maswali, flashcards, mjadala, kupanga, au mrejesho.

entries.source: Yes. Code Tutor can explain concepts, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you practice without turning learning into copy-paste.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Code Tutor inaweza kueleza dhana, kupitia mifano, kukuomba utabiri tabia, na kukusaidia kufanya mazoezi bila kugeuza kujifunza kuwa copy-paste.

entries.source: Yes. Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with practice and review.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Exam Prep Planner inaweza kugeuza mada zako, tarehe, na muda uliopo kuwa mfuatano wa vitendo wa marudio wenye mazoezi na mapitio.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma za wageni huwaruhusu walimu kujaribu tabia ya kujifunza kabla ya kujadili usambazaji maalum.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma za wageni kama Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, maswali, flashcards, na mrejesho wa uandishi hufunguka moja kwa moja.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma za wageni kama Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, maswali, na flashcards hufunguka moja kwa moja kutoka URL rasmi za /chat/{topicSlug}.

entries.source: Yes. Public mode URLs open directly in guest mode so a learner can start immediately, then create an account later if they want saved history or more usage.
entries.value: Ndiyo. URL za hali za umma hufunguka moja kwa moja katika hali ya mgeni ili mwanafunzi aanze mara moja, kisha afungue akaunti baadaye ikiwa anataka historia iliyohifadhiwa au matumizi zaidi.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Hali za umma hufanya kazi kwa mada za shule, ujuzi wa kitaaluma, usimbaji, utafiti, miradi, na taratibu binafsi za kusoma.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Gumzo za mada za umma kama Jifunze Chochote, Maelekezo ya Kisokrati, Kocha wa Kazi ya Nyumbani, maswali, na flashcards hufunguka moja kwa moja katika hali ya mgeni.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Njia za umma za kuingia kwenye mada kama /chat/learn-anything na /chat/socratic-instruction zimekusudiwa kuwa kurasa za kujifunza zinazoweza kuorodheshwa.

entries.source: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are public modes designed for active recall and mistake repair.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, na Spaced Review ni hali za umma zilizoundwa kwa kukumbuka kwa bidii na kurekebisha makosa.

entries.source: Yes. Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask questions, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting evidence.
entries.value: Ndiyo. Reading Companion inaweza kurahisisha vifungu, kuuliza maswali, kueleza msamiati, na kukusaidia kutambua dai kuu na ushahidi unaouliunga mkono.
